generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. NO BORDERS. FULL BLEED IMAGE. WIDE FIELD OF VIEW. ANTHROPOMORPHIC: A Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs on a cliff overlook. He holds EXACTLY TWO wooden wands: one held firmly in his hand, and another one standing vertically beside him on the ground. In his other hand, he holds a small, glowing world-globe orb. Slender build, sharp facial structure, white ear spots, forehead stripes. High-fidelity biological markers. 2:3 vertical crop compatible composition.
generation.narrative: A leopard cat stands at a vantage point, holding its territory in its hand while evaluating the distant fragments of forest. It represents the crucial planning stage before moving into new habitat.

meanings.upright: Planning, decision-making, looking ahead, and evaluates potential path between habitat fragments.
meanings.reversed: Indecision, fear of the unknown, or poor evaluation of landscape safety.

ecology.mapping_note: Two of Wands becomes the decision to move between distant forest patches—a calculated risk based on environmental reading.

website.excerpt: Evaluating the landscape from a high ridge, the leopard cat plans its next move between forest fragments.
website.seo_description: Two of Wands reimagined as leopard cat landscape evaluation and planning.

meaning.zh: Planning, decision-making, looking ahead, and evaluates potential path between habitat fragments.
meaning.en: Planning, decision-making, looking ahead, and evaluates potential path between habitat fragments.
